en: When the day of Pentecost arrived, they were all together in one place.
zh: 五旬節到了，他們都聚集在一起。

en: And suddenly there came from heaven a sound like a mighty rushing wind, and it filled the entire house where they were sitting.
zh: 忽然有一陣好像強風吹過的響聲，從天而來，充滿了他們坐在裡面的整間屋子。

en: And divided tongues as of fire appeared to them and rested on each one of them.
zh: 又有火燄般的舌頭顯現出來，分別落在他們各人身上。

en: And they were all filled with the Holy Spirit and began to speak in other tongues as the Spirit gave them utterance.
zh: 他們都被聖靈充滿，就照著聖靈所賜給他們的口才，用別種語言說出話來。

en: Now there were dwelling in Jerusalem Jews, devout men from every nation under heaven.
zh: 那時住在耶路撒冷的，有從天下各國來的虔誠的猶太人。

en: And at this sound the multitude came together, and they were bewildered, because each one was hearing them speak in his own language.
zh: 這聲音一響，許多人都聚了來，人人都聽見門徒講出聽眾各人本鄉的話，就莫名其妙。

en: And they were amazed and astonished, saying, "Are not all these who are speaking Galileans?
zh: 他們又驚訝、又驚奇，說：“你看，這些說話的，不都是加利利人嗎？

en: And how is it that we hear, each of us in his own native language?
zh: 我們各人怎麼聽見他們講我們從小所用的本鄉話呢？

en: Parthians and Medes and Elamites and residents of Mesopotamia, Judea and Cappadocia, Pontus and Asia,
zh: 我們帕提亞人、瑪代人、以攔人和住在美索不達米亞、猶太、加帕多家、本都、亞西亞、

en: Phrygia and Pamphylia, Egypt and the parts of Libya belonging to Cyrene, and visitors from Rome,
zh: 弗呂家、旁非利亞、埃及，並靠近古利奈的利比亞一帶地方的人，客居羅馬的猶太人和歸信猶太教的人，

en: both Jews and proselytes, Cretans and Arabians- we hear them telling in our own tongues the mighty works of God."
zh: 克里特人以及阿拉伯人，都聽見他們用我們的語言，講說 神的大作為。”

en: And all were amazed and perplexed, saying to one another, "What does this mean?"
zh: 眾人還在驚訝迷惘的時候，彼此說：“這是甚麼意思？”

en: But others mocking said, "They are filled with new wine."
zh: 另有些人譏笑說：“他們是給新酒灌醉了。”

en: But Peter, standing with the eleven, lifted up his voice and addressed them, "Men of Judea and all who dwell in Jerusalem, let this be known to you, and give ear to my words.
zh: 彼得和十一使徒站起來，他高聲對眾人說：“猶太人和所有住在耶路撒冷的人哪，你們應當明白這件事，也應該留心聽我的話。

en: For these men are not drunk, as you suppose, since it is only the third hour of the day.
zh: 這些人並不是照你們所想的喝醉了，現在不過是上午九點鐘罷了。

en: But this is what was uttered through the prophet Joel:
zh: 這正是約珥先知所說的：

en: "'And in the last days it shall be, God declares, that I will pour out my Spirit on all flesh, and your sons and your daughters shall prophesy, and your young men shall see visions, and your old men shall dream dreams;
zh: ‘ 神說：在末後的日子， 我要把我的靈澆灌所有的人， 你們的兒女要說預言， 你們的青年人要見異象， 你們的老年人要作異夢。

en: even on my male servants and female servants in those days I will pour out my Spirit, and they shall prophesy.
zh: 在那些日子， 我也要把我的靈澆灌我的僕人和使女，他們就要說預言。

en: And I will show wonders in the heavens above and signs on the earth below, blood, and fire, and vapor of smoke;
zh: 我要在天上顯出奇事， 在地上顯出神蹟， 有血、有火、有煙霧；

en: the sun shall be turned to darkness and the moon to blood, before the day of the Lord comes, the great and magnificent day.
zh: 太陽將變為黑暗， 月亮將變為血紅， 在主偉大顯赫的日子臨到以前，這一切都要發生。

en: And it shall come to pass that everyone who calls upon the name of the Lord shall be saved.'
zh: 那時，凡求告主名的，都必得救。’

en: "Men of Israel, hear these words: Jesus of Nazareth, a man attested to you by God with mighty works and wonders and signs that God did through him in your midst, as you yourselves know-
zh: “以色列人哪，請聽聽這幾句話：正如你們所知道的， 神已經藉著拿撒勒人耶穌在你們中間施行了大能、奇事、神蹟，向你們證明他是 神所立的。

en: this Jesus, delivered up according to the definite plan and foreknowledge of God, you crucified and killed by the hands of lawless men.
zh: 他照著 神的定旨和預知被交了出去，你們就藉不法之徒的手，把他釘死了。

en: God raised him up, loosing the pangs of death, because it was not possible for him to be held by it.
zh: 神卻把死的痛苦解除，使他復活了，因為他不能被死亡拘禁。

en: For David says concerning him, "' I saw the Lord always before me, for he is at my right hand that I may not be shaken;
zh: 大衛指著他說： ‘我時常看見主在我面前， 因他在我右邊，我必不會動搖。

en: therefore my heart was glad, and my tongue rejoiced; my flesh also will dwell in hope.
zh: 為此我的心快樂，我的口舌歡呼， 我的肉身也要安居在盼望中。

en: For you will not abandon my soul to Hades, or let your Holy One see corruption.
zh: 因你必不把我的靈魂撇在陰間， 也必不容你的聖者見朽壞。

en: You have made known to me the paths of life; you will make me full of gladness with your presence.'
zh: 你已經把生命之路指示了我， 必使我在你面前有滿足的喜樂。’

en: "Brothers, I may say to you with confidence about the patriarch David that he both died and was buried, and his tomb is with us to this day.
zh: “弟兄們，關於祖先大衛的事，我不妨坦白告訴你們，他死了，葬了，直到今日他的墳墓還在我們這裡。

en: Being therefore a prophet, and knowing that God had sworn with an oath to him that he would set one of his descendants on his throne,
zh: 他是先知，既然知道 神向他起過誓，要從他的後裔中立一位，坐在他的寶座上，

en: he foresaw and spoke about the resurrection of the Christ, that he was not abandoned to Hades, nor did his flesh see corruption.
zh: 又預先看見了這事，就講論基督的復活說： ‘他不會被撇在陰間， 他的肉身也不見朽壞。’

en: This Jesus God raised up, and of that we all are witnesses.
zh: 這位耶穌， 神已經使他復活了，我們都是這事的見證人。

en: Being therefore exalted at the right hand of God, and having received from the Father the promise of the Holy Spirit, he has poured out this that you yourselves are seeing and hearing.
zh: 他既然被高舉到 神的右邊，從父領受了所應許的聖靈，就把他澆灌下來，這就是你們所看見所聽見的。

en: For David did not ascend into the heavens, but he himself says, "' The Lord said to my Lord, Sit at my right hand,
zh: 大衛並沒有升到天上，他卻說： ‘主對我主說： 你坐在我的右邊，

en: until I make your enemies your footstool.'
zh: 等我使你的仇敵作你的腳凳。’

en: Let all the house of Israel therefore know for certain that God has made him both Lord and Christ, this Jesus whom you crucified."
zh: 因此，以色列全家應當確實知道，你們釘在十字架上的這位耶穌， 神已經立他為主為基督了。”

en: Now when they heard this they were cut to the heart, and said to Peter and the rest of the apostles, "Brothers, what shall we do?"
zh: 他們聽了以後，覺得扎心，就對彼得和其餘的使徒說：“弟兄們，我們應當作甚麼呢？”

en: And Peter said to them, "Repent and be baptized every one of you in the name of Jesus Christ for the forgiveness of your sins, and you will receive the gift of the Holy Spirit.
zh: 彼得說：“你們應當悔改，並且每一個人都要奉耶穌基督的名受洗，使你們的罪得赦，就必領受聖靈，那白白的恩典。

en: For the promise is for you and for your children and for all who are far off, everyone whom the Lord our God calls to himself."
zh: 這應許原是給你們和你們的兒女，以及所有在遠方的人，就是給凡是我們主 神召來歸他的人。”

en: And with many other words he bore witness and continued to exhort them, saying, "Save yourselves from this crooked generation."
zh: 彼得還用許多別的話，鄭重作證，並且勸勉他們，說：“你們應當救自己脫離這彎曲的世代！”

en: So those who received his word were baptized, and there were added that day about three thousand souls.
zh: 於是接受他話的人都受了洗，那一天門徒增加了約三千人。

en: And they devoted themselves to the apostles' teaching and fellowship, to the breaking of bread and the prayers.
zh: 他們恆心遵守使徒的教訓，彼此相通、擘餅和祈禱。

en: And awe came upon every soul, and many wonders and signs were being done through the apostles.
zh: 使徒行了許多奇事神蹟，眾人就都懼怕。

en: And all who believed were together and had all things in common.
zh: 所有信的人都在一起，凡物公用，

en: And they were selling their possessions and belongings and distributing the proceeds to all, as any had need.
zh: 並且變賣產業和財物，按照各人的需要分給他們。

en: And day by day, attending the temple together and breaking bread in their homes, they received their food with glad and generous hearts,
zh: 他們天天同心在殿裡恆切地聚集，一家一家地擘餅，存著歡樂和誠懇的心用飯，

en: praising God and having favor with all the people. And the Lord added to their number day by day those who were being saved.
zh: 又讚美 神，並且得到全民的喜愛。主將得救的人，天天加給教會。
